race.comment: CROWS (8) was in the money over this journey two back then failed at the longer trip last time when eighth at Marble Bar. Finds a more suitable contest and is a leading player. PERCUSSION PRINCE (6) scored two runs back then was popular with punters last time but could only manage to finish fifth over 1400m at Marble Bar after he was in contention on the corner. Going up a level this time but he is good enough to play a major role. LADY CABERNET (10) finished out of the money two starts back then she was never in contention and was beaten 6 lengths when seventh over 1200m at Marble Bar eight days ago. Facing a tougher assignment but she is capable of running a bold race. DAWN RETREAT (9) made progress last time out, finishing 3 lengths from the winner in second over 1200m at Marble Bar. Likely improver who looks sure to play a big role. LA SIGNORA DANE (3) appears to be building this campaign and she can't be discounted.
